name: Jeli Incident Learning and Postmortems API
what_it_does: Incident learning and post-incident review platform — enabling engineering teams to conduct structured postmortem reviews, analyze incident timelines from Slack/PagerDuty/GitHub data, collaborate on findings, and build organizational learning from failures, with an API for importing incidents and exporting findings.
use_cases: Conducting structured postmortem reviews via Jeli for incident learning automation
Importing incident data via Jeli API from PagerDuty and Slack for timeline reconstruction
Analyzing incident patterns via Jeli for systemic reliability improvement
Sharing incident learning via Jeli for organization-wide blameless postmortem culture
Integrating Jeli incident insights via API into engineering metrics dashboards
not_for: Real-time incident response and alerting (use PagerDuty or OpsGenie for alerting)
General project management or issue tracking (Jeli is incident-learning specific)
best_when: An engineering team wants to build organizational learning from incidents through structured postmortems and timeline analysis — particularly teams committed to blameless incident culture.
avoid_when: You need real-time incident alerting, basic postmortem templates without analysis features, or are just starting with incident management.

auth.notes: API key authentication. Bearer token in Authorization header. API key from Jeli account settings. Slack integration for incident data import. PagerDuty integration for alert data. GitHub integration for PR/deployment correlation. No OAuth2 for API. No webhooks. NOTE: Jeli acquired by PagerDuty in 2023 — API/product direction may change.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: limited incidents; trial period
pricing.paid_tiers: Team $25/user/month; Enterprise custom; Now included in PagerDuty suite
pricing.notes: US company (San Francisco). Founded 2019 by Nora Jones (former Netflix engineer). Acquired by PagerDuty in 2023. Focus: learning from incidents, not just tracking them. Nora Jones: 'Incident Learning at Netflix' background. Narrative analysis of incidents. Timeline reconstruction from Slack conversations. Blameless culture emphasis. Jeli Howie: AI-powered postmortem facilitation. Systems thinking approach. Post-acquisition: being integrated into PagerDuty platform. Future standalone pricing may change as PagerDuty integration deepens.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Bearer token. Acquired by PagerDuty 2023 — API direction uncertain. Slack/PD/GitHub integrations. AI postmortem facilitation. Blameless culture focus. No webhooks. Limited docs.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Incident reads idempotent by incident ID. Import operations may be idempotent with deduplication. Limited API documentation.
known_agent_gotchas: Acquired by PagerDuty 2023 — API and pricing may change as it's integrated into PagerDuty platform
Primary value is the incident learning workflow, not API integration — evaluate product-fit first
Slack integration is core: Jeli imports Slack conversation threads to reconstruct incident timeline
Howie AI: AI-generated postmortem questions based on incident timeline (unique feature)
US data residency — verify for EU compliance requirements
Check current PagerDuty pricing pages as standalone Jeli pricing may change post-acquisition

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. Bearer token. SOC2 certified. Incident data (often sensitive operational details) stored in Jeli. PagerDuty acquisition brings enterprise security posture. US data residency. Slack conversation data imported — review data handling for sensitive channels. No OAuth2. No webhooks.
